# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Upload Artifacts

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Set up JDK
        uses: actions/setup-java@v2
        with:
          java-version: '11'

      - name: Build application
        run: ./gradlew build

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: |
            build/libs/*.jar
            config/*
            scripts/*

  security-check:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Run security checks
        run: |
          # Add security scanning commands here
          echo "Running security checks..."

      - name: Upload security report
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: security-report
          path: security-report.txt

permissions:
  contents: read
  id-token: write
  actions: read
  artifacts: write
